Five Lessons Learned from Delivering 10
TEDxTalks
As speakers, we know storytelling has the power
to make our presentations memorable
By learning how to use stories to demonstrate transformation or realizations during
your talk, and you will permanently engrain your stories in the hearts and minds of the
audience:
Prepare to change the lives of your audience
Present your talk with purpose and confidence
Learn how to deliver amusing anecdotes. striking examples, astounding facts, and a
little vulnerability.
